reasoning: Based on evidence available through April 2026, GoPro did not file for bankruptcy before July 1, 2025. Following a going concern and potential Chapter 11 warning in early 2025, the company managed to survive the period. They reported their Q2 2025 results normally in August 2025, mentioning an amendment to their Second Lien Credit Agreement on August 4, 2025. They subsequently released Q3 results in November 2025 and Q4/Annual 2025 results in March 2026. Throughout this time, the company continued trading under the NASDAQ:GPRO ticker and launched new products in Q3 2025, confirming it did not enter bankruptcy protection before the July 1, 2025 deadline.
